title: nepeta zangezura
intro: Nepeta zangezura, also known as Zangezur catmint or Persian catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the South Caucasus region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Nepeta zangezura include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Nepeta zangezura can be consumed as a tea, used in tinctures, or applied topically as a salve or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
